title: display-mcp Tool Schema
description: MCP tool definitions for the CognitiveOS display bridge — framebuffer image/video rendering

tools.name: cognitiveos.display.render_image
tools.description: Render an image file to the primary display framebuffer

path.description: Absolute path to the image file

fit.description: How to fit the image to the screen

tools.name: cognitiveos.display.render_video
tools.description: Play a video file on the primary display using DRM direct rendering

path.description: Absolute path to the video file

tools.name: cognitiveos.display.screenshot
tools.description: Capture the current framebuffer contents to a file

tools.name: cognitiveos.display.clear
tools.description: Clear the framebuffer and return display to idle state

E_NOT_FOUND.description: Media file not found at specified path

E_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT.description: File format not supported by the framebuffer renderer

E_BUSY.description: Framebuffer is currently in use by another process

E_HARDWARE.description: Display hardware error (no framebuffer device, DRM init failed)
